name: instagram-clone-microservices
description: Root management for Instagram Clone Microservices

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix microservices/api-gateway && npm install --prefix microservices/auth-service && npm install --prefix microservices/post-service && npm install --prefix microservices/interaction-service
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm start --prefix microservices/auth-service" "npm start --prefix microservices/post-service" "npm start --prefix microservices/interaction-service" "npm start --prefix microservices/api-gateway"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix microservices/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix microservices/post-service" "npm run dev --prefix microservices/interaction-service" "npm run dev --prefix microservices/api-gateway"
